Module chariot
Package chariot.api

Interface Builders.TokenBuilder

All Superinterfaces:
Builders.AuthBuilder, Builders.Builder
Enclosing interface:
Builders
public static interface Builders.TokenBuilder extends Builders.Builder, Builders.AuthBuilder

  • Method Details

    • auth

      default Builders.TokenBuilder auth(String token)
      Enables use of authenticated endpoints, by using the supplied token for authentication.
      Specified by:
      auth in interface Builders.AuthBuilder

    • auth

      Builders.TokenBuilder auth(Supplier<char[]> token)
      Enables use of authenticated endpoints, by using the supplied token for authentication.
      Specified by:
      auth in interface Builders.AuthBuilder

    • auth

      Builders.TokenBuilder auth(Set<Supplier<char[]>> tokens)
      Enables use of authenticated endpoints, by using the supplied tokens for authentication. The server will be queried for each token to see which scopes they are valid for, and when making a request to an endpoint which needs a specific scope, a token providing that scope will be used.
      Specified by:
      auth in interface Builders.AuthBuilder

    • auth

      Builders.TokenBuilder auth(Map<Client.Scope,Supplier<char[]>> tokens)
      Enables use of authenticated endpoints, by using the supplied tokens for authentication. When making a request to an endpoint which needs a specific scope, the token providing that scope will be used.
      Specified by:
      auth in interface Builders.AuthBuilder

    • api

      Builders.TokenBuilder api(String url)
      Custom API URL
      Specified by:
      api in interface Builders.Builder

      Specified by:
      servers in interface Builders.Builder
